code.description: HTTP-style status; mirrors response status code

status.description: Focal post, or a tombstone when the post is unavailable

type.description: Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)
Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)
Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)
Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)

screen_name.description: Handle or account id used in permalinks (@user on X).

status.description: Parent post id (X: snowflake; Bluesky: record key).

url.description: Permalink to the parent post when known.

profile_url.description: Permalink to the parent author profile when known.

display_name.description: Display name of the parent author when known.

type.description: Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)
Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)
Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)
Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)

code.description: HTTP-style status; mirrors response status code

type.description: Discriminator: child of a parent status (e.g. comment).

parent_id.description: Parent post id (e.g. Instagram shortcode / media key).

type.description: Facet kind: e.g. url, mention, hashtag, bold, media, custom_emoji (Mastodon custom emoji image)

media_pk.description: Underlying media or comment pk from the provider when `id` is a shortcode or other canonical surface id.

type.description: Discriminator: grouped conversation snippet in a timeline (API v2).

truncated.description: True when the conversation has more posts than listed in `statuses` (Twitter: `allTweetIds` length vs visible). False when counts match or upstream did not provide `allTweetIds`.

reason.description: Set to `suspended` when the user is suspended; omitted for plain not found.

id.description: Numeric user id when the upstream payload includes it.

get.description: Returns one X/Twitter post by snowflake ID. Optional `about_account` / `aboutAccount` adds account metadata when present.

parameters.description: If truthy, include `about_account` on author when available
parameters.name: about_account

parameters.description: Target language (ISO 639-1 or 639-5, e.g. `en`, `es`, `zh-cn`) for inline X translations when available; falls back to translation API if missing
parameters.name: lang

200.description: Post payload (check `code` for upstream errors mirrored as HTTP status)

get.description: Returns users who reposted the given status. Use `cursor.bottom` from the prior response to fetch the next page.
Returns posts whose text quotes the given post (X search operator `quoted_tweet_id`). Uses the Latest search tab. Use `cursor.bottom` from the prior response to fetch the next page.

parameters.description: Target language (ISO 639-1 or 639-5, e.g. `en`, `es`, `zh-cn`) for inline X translations when available; falls back to translation API if missing
parameters.name: lang

get.description: Same as `/2/status/{id}` but includes the conversation thread when available. Supports `about_account` / `aboutAccount`.

parameters.description: If truthy, include `about_account` on author when available
parameters.name: about_account

parameters.description: Target language (ISO 639-1 or 639-5, e.g. `en`, `es`, `zh-cn`) for inline X translations when available; falls back to translation API if missing
parameters.name: lang

get.description: Returns a post, its full thread chain (walking all the way to the root), and replies from other users. Replies are sorted by the chosen ranking mode (default: Likes). Use the returned bottom cursor to paginate through more replies.

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from a prior response
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: If truthy, include `about_account` on author when available
parameters.name: about_account

parameters.description: Target language (ISO 639-1 or 639-5, e.g. `en`, `es`, `zh-cn`) for inline X translations when available; falls back to translation API if missing
parameters.name: lang

200.description: Conversation payload with thread, replies, and pagination cursor

get.description: Optional `since` (Unix time): when used without `cursor`, returns **204 No Content** if no posts in the page are newer than that instant; otherwise returns the normal JSON timeline. Values ≥ 1e12 are treated as milliseconds; smaller values as seconds.

parameters.description: Username without @, or numeric user id as `id:<rest_id>` (e.g. `id:783214`). Case-insensitive `id:` prefix.
parameters.name: handle

parameters.description: Unix timestamp (seconds, or ms if ≥ 1e12). Without `cursor`, 204 if no post is strictly newer than this time.
parameters.name: since

parameters.description: If truthy (`1`, `true`, `yes`, `on`, or empty), include replies using alternate upstream timelines
parameters.name: with_replies

parameters.description: If truthy (`1`, `true`, etc.), return `results` as a mix of `type: "status"` and `type: "thread"` entries (grouped conversation rows).
parameters.name: groupthreads

parameters.description: Target language (ISO 639-1 or 639-5, e.g. `en`, `es`, `zh-cn`) for inline X translations when available; falls back to translation API if missing
parameters.name: lang

200.description: Timeline page (flat or grouped when `groupthreads` is set)

204.description: No posts newer than `since` (only when `since` is set and `cursor` is omitted; same conditions as 200 otherwise)

400.description: Invalid path or query parameters (e.g. `count` out of range)

404.description: User not found or empty timeline

parameters.description: Username without @, or numeric user id as `id:<rest_id>` (e.g. `id:783214`). Case-insensitive `id:` prefix.
parameters.name: handle

parameters.description: Target language (ISO 639-1 or 639-5, e.g. `en`, `es`, `zh-cn`) for inline X translations when available; falls back to translation API if missing
parameters.name: lang

400.description: Invalid path or query parameters (e.g. `count` out of range)

404.description: User not found or empty timeline

parameters.name: handle

parameters.description: Target language (ISO 639-1 or 639-5, e.g. `en`, `es`, `zh-cn`) for inline X translations when available; falls back to translation API if missing

get.description: Returns profile fields for a user. Optional `about_account` / `aboutAccount` (truthy) adds `about_account` on the user when available.

parameters.description: Username without @, or numeric user id as `id:<rest_id>` (e.g. `id:783214`). Case-insensitive `id:` prefix.
parameters.name: handle

parameters.description: If truthy, include `about_account` on author when available
parameters.name: about_account

404.description: User not found, suspended (`reason`: `suspended`, `message`: User is suspended), or unavailable

parameters.description: Target language (ISO 639-1 or 639-5, e.g. `en`, `es`, `zh-cn`) for inline X translations when available; falls back to translation API if missing
parameters.name: lang

parameters.description: Comma-separated suggestion kinds to request from X: `events`, `users`, `topics` (default: all three). Other values are ignored. Hashtag-style hits appear under `topics`.
parameters.name: result_type

404.description: Upstream returned an error payload for this query

400.description: Invalid query parameters (e.g. `type` or `count` out of allowed range)
